title: wagneriopteris beddomei
intro: Wagneriopteris beddomei, also known as the Indian fern or Beddome's wagneriopteris, is a species of fern belonging to the family Dipteridaceae. Wagneriopteris beddomei has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Wagneriopteris beddomei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions in Ayurvedic medicine.
